subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Bear thou witness within thine own self that verily there is no God but Him, and that the Beauty of Oneness and the Letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله ان استشهدی فی نفسک بانه لا اله الا هو و ان جمال الاحدیه و حرف
